title: Add operator overloading (+, -, *, /, %, unary -) for Array types

comments.author: phase-4-coordinator
comments.content: Plan: Implement std::ops::{Add,Sub,Mul,Div,Rem,Neg} for Array<T,D> in ferray-core with Output = FerrayResult<Array<T,D>>. Users write (a + b)? to get the result. This maintains the zero-panic guarantee while enabling natural math syntax. The impls will delegate to ferray-core's own elementwise operations (not ferray-ufunc, to avoid circular deps). Need to implement for: owned+owned, owned+ref, ref+owned, ref+ref combinations. Ref: GitHub issue dollspace-gay/ferray#7
